zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox於1425年10月16日出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利時，他的父親Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault18歲，母親Lady Catherine Seton15歲。他和Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1495年7月8日在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾雷福盧。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox was born on 16 October 1425, in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault, was 18 and his mother, Lady Catherine Seton, was 15. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox. He died on 8 July 1495, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox est né le 16 octobre 1425, à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Seton, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1495, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox am 16. Oktober 1425 in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault 18 und seine Mutter Lady Catherine Seton 15. Er hatte mit Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juli 1495 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox è nato il il 16 ottobre 1425 nel Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catherine Seton, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox. Morì il 8 luglio 1495, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennoxが1425年10月16日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーで生まれた時，父Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressaultは18歳，母Lady Catherine Setonは15歳であった。彼はMargaret Montgomery Countess of Lennoxとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1495年7月8日に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアレンフリューにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox(이)가 1425년 10월 16일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Seton(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 7월 8일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 렌프레에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox nasceu em 16 de outubro de 1425, em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Seton, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1495, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Lennox родился 16 октября 1425 г. в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alan Stewart 2nd Lord of Aubigny and Concressault было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Seton, 15. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox. Он умер 8 июля 1495 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ренфрю, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Margaret Montgomery Countess of Lennox.
